ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the flight */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the flight */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1=Monday, 7=Sunday) */,
  "airline" TEXT /* Airline code */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "tail_number" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "origin_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the origin airport */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the destination airport */,
  "sched_dep" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "sched_arr" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_dep" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "actual_arr" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "departure_delay" INTEGER /* Departure delay in minutes */,
  "arrival_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight in miles */,
  "scheduled_time" INTEGER /* Total scheduled time in minutes */,
  "delay_or_not" INTEGER /* Indicates if there was a delay (0 for No, 1 for Yes) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation (if the flight was cancelled) */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the crew assigned to the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin_airport FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline FOREIGN KEY ("airline") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_airport FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airline is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airline's official website */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "frequent_flyer_program" TEXT /* Name of the frequent flyer program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight affected by the delay */,
  "delay_time" INTEGER /* Delay duration in minutes */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_category" TEXT /* Category of the delay (e.g., weather, mechanical, air traffic control) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the delay on the flight (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the passenger */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight the passenger is booked on */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer number of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "travel_class" TEXT /* Class of travel (e.g., Economy, Business, First) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, operations staff, customer service) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object describing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight the feedback is about */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the passenger */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the passenger */,
  "flight_class" TEXT /* Class of travel for the feedback (e.g., Economy, Business, First) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight's current status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the status was last updated */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number where the flight is scheduled to depart/arrive */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal where the flight is scheduled to depart/arrive */,
  "actual_status" TEXT /* Actual status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "origin_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the origin airport */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the destination airport */,
  "average_distance" INTEGER /* Average distance of the route in miles */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the route in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_destination_airport FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_origin_airport FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduled_flights" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "sched_dep" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "sched_arr" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "scheduled_time" INTEGER /* Total scheduled time in minutes */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the scheduled flight (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "recurrence_pattern" TEXT /* Recurrence pattern for the scheduled flight (e.g., every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduled_flights_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
